summary.key_theme: 市場高度關注 GE Aerospace 即將公布的 Q1 財報，儘管存在估值與成本壓力，但強勁的積壓訂單與資本回報計畫支撐了投資人的樂觀情緒。

bullish.title: Wall Street Is Bullish on GE Aerospace Before Q1 Results
bullish.reason: 華爾街分析師普遍看好 GE Aerospace 的 Q1 表現，主要歸功於龐大的裝機量、強勁的市場需求以及穩健的積壓訂單。

bullish.title: Can GE Aerospace Continue Its Robust Capital Returns to Shareholders?
bullish.reason: GE 透過大規模股票回購與提升股息，展現了強勁的現金流能力，這對長期投資人具有高度吸引力。

bullish.title: GE Aerospace (GE) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release
bullish.reason: 分析指出 GE 具備財報超預期的關鍵要素，預計營收與獲利將呈現成長趨勢。

bullish.title: Where Will GE Aerospace Stock Be in 3 Years?
bullish.reason: 長期展望正面，認為公司目前面臨的營運挑戰將轉化為未來的成長動力。

bullish.title: GE Vernova (GEV) Rises Higher Than Market
bullish.reason: GE Vernova 股價表現優於大盤，顯示市場對該分拆業務的短期買盤力道強勁。

bullish.title: Why Boeing, GE Supplier Woodward Has Clear Skies Ahead
bullish.reason: 供應鏈夥伴 Woodward 的業務前景看好，間接反映了航空航太產業整體需求的強勁。

bullish.title: GE Vernova Eyeing Venezuela Opportunity, CEO Says
bullish.reason: 公司展現積極拓展地緣政治敏感地區市場的意圖，雖具風險但顯示其全球擴張野心。

bullish.title: Here's How Much You Would Have Made Owning GE Aerospace Stock In The Last 5 Years
bullish.reason: 回顧過去 5 年的績效，強化了投資人對公司長期價值創造的信心。

bearish.title: GE Aerospace (GE) Stock Slides as Market Rises
bearish.reason: 股價單日下跌 4.98%，與大盤走勢背離，顯示短期內存在獲利了結或賣壓。

bearish.title: GE Q1 Earnings Preview: Buy the Stock Now or Wait for the Results?
bearish.reason: 儘管成長預期強勁，但高估值與成本壓力可能限制股價短期上漲空間。

bearish.title: GE Vernova (GEV) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
bearish.reason: 分析指出 GE Vernova 目前缺乏財報超預期的關鍵指標，建議投資人保持謹慎。

bearish.title: Massive Ford Recall: About 1.4 Million F-150 Trucks Hit By Gearshift Glitch
bearish.reason: 雖主要針對 Ford，但工業類股的負面新聞可能對整體製造業情緒產生連帶影響。

neutral.title: Warsh Hearing, Tesla Earnings: What to Watch Next Week
neutral.reason: 提及財報季即將進入高峰，GE 屬於市場關注焦點之一，但無特定利多或利空訊息。

neutral.title: Ahead of GE (GE) Q1 Earnings: Get Ready With Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
neutral.reason: 提供財報前瞻數據，屬於中性的資訊整理，協助投資人評估關鍵指標。

neutral.title: GE Vernova Inc. (GEV) Is a Trending Stock: Facts to Know Before Betting on It
neutral.reason: 僅指出該股票近期搜尋熱度高，屬於市場情緒觀察，無具體營運消息。

neutral.title: Investors Heavily Search GE Aerospace (GE): Here is What You Need to Know
neutral.reason: 同上，反映市場關注度提升，但未提供新的基本面資訊。

neutral.title: Market Chatter: General Motors, Ford in Talks With Pentagon to Boost Defense Manufacturing
neutral.reason: 報導通用與福特與國防部談判，雖涉及國防製造，但與 GE 本身業務無直接關聯。

neutral.title: Market Chatter: General Motors, Ford in Talks With Pentagon to Boost Defense Manufacturing
neutral.reason: 與上述新聞重複，選此篇作為代表，內容為市場傳聞，對 GE 影響中性。

neutral.title: GE Vernova (GEV) Rises Higher Than Market: Key Facts
neutral.reason: 與第一篇 bullish 新聞重複，此處歸類為中性市場數據回顧。

neutral.title: The AI Backlash Has Turned Violent. And It’s Still the Technology’s Early Days.
neutral.reason: 討論 AI 產業的社會反彈，與 GE 核心業務無直接相關，影響極小。
